task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the database file (/home/ga/chinook.odb) opened in a database management tool such as LibreOffice Base.

task_completion.description: Add the LoyaltyTier column to the Customer table
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the table design view or an executed SQL ALTER TABLE command adding a 'LoyaltyTier' column of type VARCHAR (or Text) to the 'Customer' table.

task_completion.description: Implement logic for the Platinum tier
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing an SQL query (UPDATE or SELECT) or GUI filter that calculates the sum of 'Total' from the 'Invoice' table and assigns 'Platinum' to customers with a total spending strictly greater than 45.00.

task_completion.description: Implement logic for the Gold tier
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing an SQL query or GUI filter assigning 'Gold' to customers with a total spending between 40.00 and 45.00 inclusive (e.g., >= 40.00 AND <= 45.00).

task_completion.description: Implement logic for the Silver tier
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing an SQL query or GUI filter assigning 'Silver' to customers with a total spending strictly less than 40.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the populated LoyaltyTier data in the Customer table
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the data view of the 'Customer' table with the 'LoyaltyTier' column successfully populated with 'Platinum', 'Gold', and 'Silver' values.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual database file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual database interface (e.g., LibreOffice Base) executing changes, rather than just writing SQL commands in a text editor without running them.

integrity.description: Agent calculated tiers dynamically using Invoice totals
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show SQL queries using SUM(), JOINs between Customer and Invoice tables, or equivalent dynamic calculations, rather than manually hardcoding tier values for specific customer IDs.

integrity.description: Results are shown in the genuine database application
integrity.visual_evidence: The final populated table is viewed within the database application's table viewer, not in a separate mocked spreadsheet or text document.
